body:
no_changes — agent-170380c1

This bead asks for the Go type additions described in the amended
CONTRACT-003 spec (Role + CorrelationID on ExecuteRequest/RouteRequest,
Power on ServiceRoutingActual, typed validators, RoutingActual.Power
populated at dispatch, MetadataKeyCollision warning).

All five acceptance criteria are already implemented and tested by prior
work on this branch:

  - 8c0cca7 feat(contract): add Role + CorrelationID + Power to
    CONTRACT-003 [agent-3bb96bf5]
  - 404684a docs(contract): finalize CONTRACT-003 spec amendments
    [agent-bc214918]

Concrete AC evidence:

  AC1 — Types updated.
    * service.go:593 ServiceExecuteRequest.Role / CorrelationID
    * service.go:356 RouteRequest.Role / CorrelationID
    * service.go:428 RouteDecision.Power
    * service_events.go:258 ServiceRoutingActual.Power

  AC2 — Validators reject invalid Role / CorrelationID with typed
        errors.
    * role_correlation.go RoleNormalizationError /
      CorrelationIDNormalizationError, ValidateRole / ValidateCorrelationID.
    * Wired into Execute (service_execute.go) and ResolveRoute
      (service_routing.go) before dispatch.
    * Covered by service_role_correlation_test.go
      (TestRoleAndCorrelationID_InvalidValuesRejectedPreDispatch +
      TestValidateRoleAndCorrelationID).

  AC3 — RoutingActual.Power populated correctly across all harnesses.
    * Single funnel point in service_execute.go finalizeAndEmit
      (line 1419) stamps Power = catalogPowerForModel(...) onto every
      terminal RoutingActual that lacked one.
    * Pre-decision Power is set in runExecute (service_execute.go:223)
      via the same projection.
    * Models not in the catalog (e.g. the virtual harness used in
      tests) report Power = 0 per the contract's documented
      "unknown / exact-pin-only" semantics.

  AC4 — Collision warning event fires under integration test.
    * service_execute.go finalizeAndEmit appends a
      ServiceFinalWarning{Code: "metadata_key_collision"} to the final
      event's Warnings when the caller's Metadata duplicates a reserved
      key (role / correlation_id) and the top-level field overrode it.
    * Asserted by
      TestRoleAndCorrelationID_TopLevelWinsOnMetadataCollisionWithWarning
      in service_role_correlation_test.go.

  AC5 — Existing tests still pass.
    * `go build ./...` clean.
    * `go vet ./...` clean.
    * `go test -count=1 -timeout 300s ./...` — all packages OK
      (verified in this worktree at base 3257b39).

No code changes are required to satisfy the bead. The contract bead
(agent-bc214918, commit 404684a) intentionally finalized the spec on top
of an already-merged implementation; this implementation bead's work was
produced in the same earlier feat-contract commit. Recording no_changes
here per the execute-bead protocol so DDx records evidence rather than
"no_evidence_produced".
